message:
fix: ATIF spec compliance — system_prompt, redacted thinking, web searches

- Add system_prompt to root extra from TranscriptHeader
- Rename redacted_thinking key to has_redacted_thinking (design doc match)
- Add ContentRedThinking case (separate from Thinking.Redacted flag)
- Change web_search boolean to structured web_searches list with query data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
